user_query: Show me days where I have both outdoor activities and a fine dining dinner planned.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 1 has an explicit outdoor activity (Harbourfront Stroll: waterfront walk, outdoor fresh air) and an evening upscale/fine dining restaurant (Canoe at 7:30 PM described as expensive fine dining with panoramic city views).

Day 8 includes a clearly outdoor activity (Niagara Falls Day Trip: full-day outdoor scenic waterfall excursion) and an evening dinner (Antler Kitchen at 8:00 PM) that is a higher-end, unique dining experience (seasonal/game menu, CAD 80-100) — qualifies as a fine-dining dinner.

Day 7 features an outdoor activity (Distillery District Walk: outdoor walking experience through historic pedestrian village) and an evening dinner (Cluny Bistro at 7:00 PM) described as romantic/intimate French bistro with higher price (CAD 70-90), indicating a fine-dining-style dinner.
